request.queryParametersTemplate: { "Username": "{{Username}}", "Site": "{{Site}}", "Timestamp": "{_QueryWindowEndTime}", "CommandParams": { "Filter": [ { "field": "Status", "operator": "!=", "value": "Open" } ], "Static Fields": [ "IR Number", "IR Type", "Title", "Status", "Severity", "Stage", "Priority", "Disposition", "Tags", "Owner", "Creator", "Timezone", "Date Created", "Date Modified", "Playbook", "Description", "Conclusion", "Investigation Team", "Linked Incidents", "Incident Raw Data", "Event Raw Data" ], "Dynamic Fields": { "Incident Owner": [ "Owner Last Update Time", "Time Spend" ], "Customer": [ "Name", "Country" ] }, "Start Time": "{_QueryWindowStartTime}", "End Time": "{_QueryWindowEndTime}", "Output Format": 2, "Page Index": 0, "Page Size": 100 } }
